info.title: TurnKit API
info.description: TurnKit game backend — multi-tenant leaderboard, matchmaking, relay and player store for indie games.

tags.name: Player ID Auth
tags.description: Configure player identity verification per game key

tags.name: Player Auth
tags.description: TurnKit player authentication for SIGNED and TURNKIT_AUTH modes

get.summary: Get a relay config by slug

put.summary: Update a relay config — replaces lists entirely
put.description: Updates an existing relay configuration. Enum values: turnEnforcement: ROUND_ROBIN, FREE; votingMode: SYNC, ASYNC; failAction: SKIP_TURN, END_GAME

put.summary: Save SMTP config for TurnKit player auth emails
Set player ID mode for a game key

get.summary: List all relay configs for a game key

post.description: Creates a new relay configuration with the specified parameters. Enum values: turnEnforcement: ROUND_ROBIN, FREE; votingMode: SYNC, ASYNC; failAction: SKIP_TURN, END_GAME
Creates the same default project setup used by Unity, or returns the existing setup for the authenticated developer and project name

get.description: Retrieves all game keys owned by the authenticated developer

post.description: Creates a new game key with the specified name for the authenticated developer

post.summary: Rotate player ID secret. Previous secret immediately invalidated.
Generate player ID secret. Returned ONCE — store securely. Invalidates previous secret.

get.description: Retrieves all leaderboards for the current game key

post.description: Creates a new leaderboard with the specified configuration. Available enum values: sortOrder: ASC (for time-based where lower is better), DESC (for points where higher is better); scoreStrategy: BEST_ONLY (keeps only best score per player), MULTIPLE_ENTRIES (stores all submissions), CUMULATIVE (sums all submissions); resetFrequency: NONE, DAILY, WEEKLY, MONTHLY
Resets all scores for a leaderboard. Optionally archives scores before reset and applies a reset label
Bans a player from all leaderboards for the current game key

delete.description: Removes a player from the banned list for the current game key

get.description: Retrieves all active client keys for the specified game key

post.description: Generates a new client key for the specified game key
Generates a Lemon Squeezy checkout URL for upgrading to a paid tier
Enables or disables automatic tier upgrades when limits are exceeded

post.summary: Join matchmaking queue for a relay config. Returns sessionId to connect WebSocket.

parameters.name: slug
parameters.description: The unique slug of the leaderboard

post.summary: Verify a signed player proof and receive a player JWT.
Verify OTP and receive a player JWT. Token valid for 14 days.
Request an OTP for a player email. Rate limited: 3 per 10 minutes.

post.description: Reloads Lemon Squeezy variant configurations from cache

delete.description: Permanently deletes a leaderboard and all its scores

patch.description: Updates only the display name of an existing leaderboard

get.description: Retrieves paginated scores for a specific leaderboard
Retrieves all banned player IDs for the current game key
Retrieves the summary data needed to render the dashboard for a single game key
Retrieves overview of all game keys with current CCU, tiers, and billing status
Retrieves hourly CCU peak data for the last 7 days for a specific game key
Retrieves billing status, tiers, and limits for a specific game key
Health check endpoint that returns current game key status and CCU

parameters.name: slug
parameters.description: The unique slug of the leaderboard

get.summary: Get player rank and surrounding scores

parameters.name: slug
parameters.description: The unique slug of the leaderboard

get.summary: Get top scores + player context in one request

parameters.name: slug
parameters.description: The unique slug of the leaderboard

delete.description: Permanently deletes a game key and all associated data
Removes a specific score entry from a leaderboard
Revokes a client key, making it invalid for future API calls

UpdateRequest.description: Relay configuration update request body. turnEnforcement: ROUND_ROBIN (players take turns in order) or FREE (any player can play anytime). votingMode: SYNC (synchronous voting) or ASYNC (asynchronous voting). failAction: SKIP_TURN (skip current player's turn) or END_GAME (end the game) when voting fails.

CreateRequest.description: Relay configuration request body. turnEnforcement: ROUND_ROBIN (players take turns in order) or FREE (any player can play anytime). votingMode: SYNC (synchronous voting) or ASYNC (asynchronous voting). failAction: SKIP_TURN (skip current player's turn) or END_GAME (end the game) when voting fails.

LeaderboardCreateRequest.description: Request object for creating a new leaderboard

slug.description: Unique identifier for the leaderboard. Used in API URLs.

displayName.description: The name displayed to players in-game.

sortOrder.description: Determines the ranking logic. DESC (default) for points where higher is better. ASC for time/speedruns where lower is better.

scoreStrategy.description: Strategy for handling score submissions. BEST_ONLY (default) keeps only the best score per player. MULTIPLE_ENTRIES stores every submission. CUMULATIVE sums all submissions of same player.

minScore.description: Optional minimum score value allowed for submission

maxScore.description: Optional maximum score value allowed for submission

resetFrequency.description: Frequency of automatic resets. NONE (default), DAILY, WEEKLY, MONTHLY.

archiveOnReset.description: If true, scores are archived before automatic reset. Default is false.

sortOrder.description: Sorting order for the leaderboard. Options: DESC, ASC

scoreStrategy.description: Strategy for handling score submissions. Options: BEST_ONLY, MULTIPLE_ENTRIES, CUMULATIVE

minScore.description: Optional minimum score value allowed for submission, default is 0.

maxScore.description: Optional maximum score value allowed for submission, default is 1000000.

resetFrequency.description: Frequency of automatic resets. Options: NONE, DAILY, WEEKLY, MONTHLY

archiveOnReset.description: If true, scores are archived before automatic reset

nextResetAt.description: Timestamp of the next scheduled reset

ScoreSubmissionRequest.description: Request object for submitting a new score

metadata.description: Optional metadata string associated with the score (Max 1000 chars)

ScoreSubmitResponse.description: Response object returned after a score submission

rank.description: The rank of the submitted score

ScoreEntryResponse.description: Response object representing a score entry with rank

leaderboardId.description: Internal ID of the score entry

rank.description: The rank of the player in the leaderboard

submittedAt.description: Timestamp when the score was submitted

metadata.description: Optional metadata associated with the score

sortOrder.description: Determines if the leaderboard is sorted by highest score (DESC) or lowest time (ASC)

TopScoreResponse.description: Minimal response object for top scores

TopScoresListResponse.description: Response object containing a list of top scores

scores.description: List of top scores with minimal data

PlayerScoreWithoutMetadataResponse.description: Response object for player score with surrounding scores without metadata

startRank.description: The rank of the first score in the list

CombinedLeaderboardResponse.description: Combined response containing top scores and player score with surrounding ranks

topScores.description: List of top scores without metadata

PlayerScoreResponse.description: Response object for player score with surrounding scores

startRank.description: The rank of the first score in the list
